name: opsgym
description: Codex skill for creating and evaluating operational simulation gyms before agents touch a real business.

interface.shortDescription: Train agents before they touch operations
interface.longDescription: OpsGym packages a Codex workflow for drafting arenas, confirming operational worlds, running policy tournaments, injecting shocks, and producing evidence-backed decision reports.
defaultPrompt: Use $opsgym. Run footballops-v0. Should the club rotate heavily or push starters through fixture congestion? Create agents, run 100 rollouts, and explain who wins.
Use $opsgym. Run deliveryops-v0. Should the marketplace accept surge demand during rain or protect SLA? Run agent tournament and compare with baseline.
Use $opsgym. Run hospitalops-v0. Should the hospital defer elective work during a surge? Add a flu-surge shock and rerun.
